name: Mr.3(Galdino) (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Cross Guild" type card or card with a type including "Baroque Works" other than [Mr.3(Galdino)] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
